final:
module RefModule(
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input [31:0] data_in,
    output reg [31:0] data_out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        data_out <= 0;
    end else if (enable) begin
        data_out <= data_in;
    end
end

endmodule
